message: Tunisian (too-nee-sian)crochet is a style of crochet that uses the extra long hooks. it's takes 2 passes per row 1st pass cast on, return pass cast of

author: minjenra
message: Tunisuan uses a long crochet hook. You make a chain then pull up a loop from each of the chain stiches first. Then cast of one chain stitch at a time.
